Enum Class Job

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<Job>
simcli.entities.models.Job
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Job>, Constable
public enum Job extends Enum<Job>
Enumeration of all available careers in the simulation, each with salary, working hours, energy drain, age limits, promotion multiplier, and max tier.

UNEMPLOYED serves as the default/fallback state for Sims without a job. Each career defines a getSalaryAtTier(int) method that computes earnings based on the promotion multiplier.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    FREELANCE_PHOTOGRAPHER
    Flexible creative career with low energy requirements.
    HARDWARE_TECHNICIAN
    Hands-on technical work with higher energy drain.
    PERSONAL_TRAINER
    Physical career with high energy drain but good pay.
    SOFTWARE_ENGINEER
    High-paying desk job with moderate energy drain.
    UNEMPLOYED
    Default state — no employment, no salary.

    Returns the energy points drained per shift.

    Returns the maximum age before forced retirement.

    Returns the highest achievable promotion tier for this career.

    Returns the minimum age required to hold this job.

    Returns the salary multiplier applied per promotion tier.
    int

    Computes the salary at a given promotion tier using the formula: baseSalary * promotionMultiplier^(tier - 1).

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static Job[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static Job valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the human-readable job title.
      Returns:
      the job title.

    • getBaseSalary

      public int getBaseSalary()
      Returns the base salary earned per shift (before tier multiplier).
      Returns:
      the base salary in Simoleons.

    • getWorkingHours

      public int getWorkingHours()
      Returns the number of working hours per shift.
      Returns:
      working hours.

    • getEnergyDrain

      public int getEnergyDrain()
      Returns the energy points drained per shift.
      Returns:
      the energy drain amount.

    • getMinAge

      public int getMinAge()
      Returns the minimum age required to hold this job.
      Returns:
      the minimum eligible age.

    • getMaxAge

      public int getMaxAge()
      Returns the maximum age before forced retirement.
      Returns:
      the maximum eligible age.

    • getPromotionMultiplier

      public double getPromotionMultiplier()
      Returns the salary multiplier applied per promotion tier.
      Returns:
      the promotion multiplier.

    • getMaxTier

      public int getMaxTier()
      Returns the highest achievable promotion tier for this career.
      Returns:
      the max tier.

    • getSalaryAtTier

      public int getSalaryAtTier(int tier)
      Computes the salary at a given promotion tier using the formula: baseSalary * promotionMultiplier^(tier - 1).

      The tier is clamped to [1, maxTier]. Returns 0 for UNEMPLOYED.

      Parameters:
      tier - the promotion tier (1-indexed).
      Returns:
      the computed salary in Simoleons.
